mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs Wyatt Akers
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs Wyatt Akers Offense: Assault and Battery Felony Victim and Complainant W.W. Stuart Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 10.22.1887 Guilty: Fine:$2.50 Court cost: $2.10 Surety of $50.00 from Otey and Spangler if Akers defaults on condition.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
